ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "slug" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the facility (slug) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the facility's website */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the facility */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the facility's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the facility's location */,
  "service_facility" INTEGER /* Indicates if the facility is a service facility */,
  "dedicated_genome_centre" INTEGER /* Indicates if the facility is a dedicated genome center */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_mask" TEXT /* Mask for the contact person */,
  "locality" TEXT /* Locality or city where the facility is located */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the facility is located */,
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the continent where the facility is located */,
  "capacity_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the facility's sequencing capacity */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the facility was created */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the facility */,
  "accreditations" TEXT /* Accreditations received by the facility */,
  "insurance_providers" TEXT /* Insurance providers for the facility */,
  "security_measures" TEXT /* Security measures in place at the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_continent_id FOREIGN KEY ("continent_id") REFERENCES continents ("continent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology */,
  "technology_name" TEXT /* Name of the technology (e.g., Illumina GA2, 454) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the technology */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_technologies" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technology used by the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id", "technology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, data analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the facility */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the facility was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "contact_role" TEXT /* Role of the contact person (e.g., director, manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_contacts_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility that placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, received) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that includes this item */,
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technology being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the technology being ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_technology_id FOREIGN KEY ("technology_id") REFERENCES technologies ("technology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "changed_fields" TEXT /* Fields that were changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
